rulings.Case Title: THE ESTATE OF GLADYS G. GOSZULAK
rulings.Calendar Matter: Petition For Preliminary Distribution
rulings.Rulings: Hearing. Appearance required. The following issues should be cleared: (1) Petition to be supplemented to set forth the accurate I&A value. (2) Proposed distribution to set forth how to distribute the securities, including the number of shares of securities to be distributed to each beneficiary. "$500,000" in securities seems insufficient. CRC 7.651 and LRSF 14.35.I.6).a. PARTIES APPEARING SHOULD CHECK IN FOR THE HEARING WITH THEIR FULL NAME. Counsel and parties may appear personally or remotely through Zoom or CourtCall. For a video appearance, go to zoom.us, click "join a meeting" and input meeting ID 160 225 4765 and password 514879. For an audio-only appearance through Zoom, call 1-669-254-5252 and key in meeting ID "160 225 4765#", then participant ID "0#", then password "514879#". (Toll rates may apply).) The Court prefers that counsel and parties appearing by video input their first and last name into the "Your Name" dialogue box. Counsel and parties may appear by audio-only telephone through CourtCall by calling 1-888-882-6878. Please review LRSF 14.1(C) for more information.

rulings.Case Title: THE ESTATE OF GLADYS G. GOSZULAK
rulings.Calendar Matter: ACCOUNTING PETITION RE: Accounting #1, Report, Fees
rulings.Rulings: Hearing. Appearance required. The following issues should be cleared: (1) Summary of Account on Page 4 (and supplement declaration) is not in compliance with Prob. Code sec. 1061. With Losses and Change in value being under Charges, the account does not balance. (2) Accordingly, Schedules are to be reorganized to support the correct Summary of Account. Schedules (3) Clarification why the fee base is equal to I&A value only without reflecting gains and losses when account has not been waived. (4) What is 10- shares of WBD issued on 4/18/22 being reported as principal receipts (5) A copy of the escrow closing statement to be filed. (6) Bank statement showing the ending balance needs to be filed. LRSF 14.34.D. (7) A copy of Letters certified no more than 60 days before the hearing showing Susan is the court appointed executor of Joan's estate. LRSF 14.35.G. (8) Proposed distribution to set forth how to distribute the securities, including the number of shares of securities to be distributed to each beneficiary. "50%" of all securities seems insufficient. CRC 7.651 and LRSF 14.35.I.6).a. (9) Attorney extraordinary fee declaration paragraph #2 addresses "mischaracterizations" (of assets). Need further explanation. (10) An amendment to the petition must be filed and noted if the different amounts of fees are being sought. The request for the change is not properly before the court. (11) Need an authority under which the Court should grant the service related to the trust administration. The Trust is not before the Court. The requests must limit the service relating to the estate only (12) No proposed order submitted. PARTIES APPEARING SHOULD CHECK IN FOR THE HEARING WITH THEIR FULL NAME. Counsel and parties may appear personally or remotely through Zoom or CourtCall. For a video appearance, go to zoom.us, click "join a meeting" and input meeting ID 160 225 4765 and password 514879. For an audio-only appearance through Zoom, call 1-669-254-5252 and key in meeting ID "160 225 4765#", then participant ID "0#", then password "514879#". (Toll rates may apply).) The Court prefers that counsel and parties appearing by video input their first and last name into the "Your Name" dialogue box. Counsel and parties may appear by audio-only telephone through CourtCall by calling 1-888-882-6878. Please review LRSF 14.1(C) for more information.

rulings.Case Title: THE ESTATE OF GARY LEE MCDONALD
rulings.Calendar Matter: ACCOUNTING PETITION RE: Fees, Final Distribution
rulings.Rulings: Continued to 4/23/25. The following issues must be cleared two weeks prior: (1) Petition to propose allocation of statutory compensation to the attorneys for the personal rep. Prob. Code sec. 10814. Accordingly, notice of hearing to those attorneys must be given to them. (2) Amendment requires re-notice CRC 7.53(a). (3) Proposed order must be submitted before the hearing. (4) Petition to correctly set forth petitioner as "administrator" as petition body consistently refers petitioner as Executor. Examiner continuances are final and not subject to contest under LRSF 14.10.B.

rulings.Case Title: IN THE MATTER OF THE PICCININI CHILDREN TRUST II TRUST
rulings.Calendar Matter: MOTION TO ADMIT COUNSEL PRO HAC VICE
rulings.Rulings: This tentative ruling is issued by Judge Ross C. Moody. Motion to Admit Brian K. Lee as Counsel Pro Hace Vice is GRANTED. Any party wishing to contest this tentative ruling by appearing at the scheduled hearing must so advise other parties and the courtroom clerk (415-551-3702) no later than 4:00 p.m. on the day before the hearing. To appear by Zoom, go to zoom.us and click "Join Meeting." Enter Meeting ID number 1602254765 and passcode 514879. To appear telephonically through Zoom, call 1-669-900-6833 and follow the prompts. Enter Meeting ID number 1602254765# and passcode 514879#. Parties appearing via Zoom should use their full names in the "Your Name" section. Counsel and parties may appear by audio-only telephone through CourtCall by calling CourtCall at 1-888-882-6878 and obtaining an appearance access code for the hearing's scheduled date and time in Department 204.

rulings.Case Title: THE ESTATE OF JAMES DALLAL
rulings.Calendar Matter: PETITION FOR LETTERS OF ADMINISTRATION
rulings.Rulings: Continued to 4/23/25. The following issues must be cleared two weeks before the date. (1) The court will not set a minimum bond without adequate waiver of bond from the heirs. Either Waiver of Bond by Heir or Beneficiary [Form DE-111(A-3e)] on file or Petition should pray for full bond of $300,000. (2) Need the Confidential Statement of Birth Date and Driver's License Number [JC Form DE-147S] to be conventionally filed. See the Local Rule of SF 14.18.E and 14.59.C. (3) Notice of Directions for Remote appearance and Access must be given. LRSF 14.1.C. (4) Each parent's written declaration to act and nomination of petitioner to act. They have higher priority. LRSF 14.24. (5) Proposed order must be submitted. LRSF 14.7. Examiner continuances are final and not subject to contest under LRSF 14.10.B.
